violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

A hose is connected to the faucet at the service/mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Employee removed hose at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
The floors in the front area of store was observed with cracks and holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
